Notes: Single UPDATE attempts to delete the zone apex name, which would remove mandatory SOA/NS content if honored literally. Follow-up queries observe whether the apex remains coherent and which RCODE the server chose.

Steps.Description: Attempt to delete the apex name campus.edu. with no prerequisites, which would syntactically target the mandatory SOA/NS owner name.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains present after the delete_name UPDATE.
